channel.title: meta on Patrick Armengol
channel.description: Recent content in meta on Patrick Armengol

item.title: Editor Hopping
item.description: Throughout my years sitting in front of a screen, there has been one constant: editing text. This post is a short digression into my history with text editors and what has led me to what I’m using today. Humble Beginnings - Notepad My memory of childhood is a bit fuzzy so I don’t quite remember much about when I first started using computers. I believe my family’s first PC was running some early version of Windows connected to the internet via dialup and all I ever did on it was play games like Freddi Fish and Pajama Sam.

item.title: My Personal Site
item.description: I want to write a bit about this site and why it exists. Maybe two years ago, I decided to register the .com domain for my name, patrickarmengol.com. I found it available, despite at least a couple other “Patrick Armengol"s existing (one of them must have taken parmengol@gmail.com). I didn’t really plan to do anything with it. I don’t know what happened, but soon afterwards I was motivated to make a website/blog.
